themes.label: Kingdom
themes.summary: This chapter stresses reign, kingdom, throne, rule, or the authority of God and His Christ. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 1 verse. Commentary leans on "And these are the kings that reigned in the land of Edom, before there reigned any king over...". Cross references echo "Kingdom".

evidenceTrail.label: Verse 31 commentary
evidenceTrail.detail: And these are the kings that reigned in the land of Edom, before there reigned any king over...

evidenceTrail.label: Verse 31 word study
evidenceTrail.detail: מֶ֖לֶךְ: And these are the kings - a king

themes.label: Creation
themes.summary: This chapter underscores creation, the heavens and earth, or God’s creative ordering work. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 1 verse. Word-study detail reinforces "אֶ֤רֶץ: and the land - the earth (at large, or partitively a land)".

evidenceTrail.label: Verse 7 word study
evidenceTrail.detail: אֶ֤רֶץ: and the land - the earth (at large, or partitively a land)
